UpdateAlarmTemplate.name: Template name
UpdateAlarmTemplate.rules.conditions: Condition list within a rule (AND rules)
UpdateAlarmTemplate.rules.pendingCount: Consecutive trigger count, value range: greater than 0
UpdateAlarmTemplate.rules.checkIntervalSeconds: Check interval in seconds, value range: greater than 0
UpdateAlarmTemplate.rules.content: Alarm condition content description (returned in query response only)
